body.title: CLOSED: Day-close: rearrange slate so Done section appears first
body.result: day-close SKILL.md step 3: Done-first section ordering at close-time (Done→Notes→SessionClose→In-flight→Ad hoc→Planned→CLOSED). Empty sections omitted. Commit 6ac30b0.
body.description:
Day-close currently closes the slate with Done section at the bottom (order: Notes, In-flight, Planned, Ad hoc, Done today). For future CC sessions reading old slates, Done-first ordering is more useful — it immediately answers 'what shipped?' without reading the whole file.

Update day-close step 3 (Close the slate) to rearrange sections before writing the CLOSED marker: Done today → Notes → Decided/Ticketed → everything else. The rearrangement applies only at close-time, not during the day (daily work keeps current order).

Also update SKILL.md day-close step 3 documentation to describe the reordering.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** None (skill doc only — no source code change).
**Scope boundary:** day-close SKILL.md step 3 only. No changes to context-load, no changes to slate creation (step 1). Out of scope: migrating existing closed slates.
**Test plan:** Manual test at next day-close — verify closed slate has Done section at top.
